programme.title: Crime Scene Investigators
programme.desc: Louisiana investigators find Andrew Jasmine in front of his home video game console, riddled with bullet holes; and with shell casings from two different firearms, the crime scene bears the hallmarks of a criminal conspiracy.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Voight wants to make his former cellmate a confidential informant as the unit tries to take down a big cocaine supplier and local dealers; Burgess makes a decision about her relationship with Ruzek; Roman works with Firehouse 51 to fund a wedding.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Lindsay goes undercover in hopes of finding a police officer who targets women leaving a local casino; Burgess needs Platt's approval to move forward with her plan; Antonio offers to take Roman's place in an upcoming boxing match.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.sub-title: The Song of Gregory Williams Yates
programme.desc: After escaping from a New York prison, convicted killer Gregory Yates (Dallas Roberts) heads to Chicago; SVU members Benson and Tutuola help investigate a triple homicide in Chicago; the team seeks a connection between Yates and a missing woman.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Burgess finds heroin in a duffel bag belonging to a mild-mannered and respected college professor; Roman talks to Platt about his career; Halstead takes an off-duty security job working for the attractive owner of a medical marijuana clinic.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.sub-title: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: Lindsay, Halstead and Mouse search for a connection when two shootings take place in gang territory; a candlelight vigil is held for a young boy who was murdered in the first shooting.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: During a bank run for his off-duty security job, Halstead and his co-workers are attacked by a violent robbery crew, which leads to a shootout; Voight and Lindsay talk to a dispensary owner who says her business has received threats from local gangs.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The team discovers a secret battered woman's shelter and learns that the owner has been wounded and a resident has been abducted; Burgess and Roman track down a man who has been catfishing people on a dating app to rob them.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Police discover a murdered teenage girl was involved in a love triangle.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.sub-title: The Windshield Cracked From Side to Side
programme.desc: Todd Kendhammer claims his wife was killed in a car accident; the forensic evidence doesn't back him up; when a new defense team, known for working on the Steve Avery case is hired, they bring in their own forensic experts who contradict the case.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.desc: When Leslie Neulander's death is declared accidental, forensic investigators sound the alarm that it was no accident.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Detective Pryma asks for Severide's help on a case involving explosives; Gallo and Carver clash.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Severide struggles with the cost of helping Det. Pryma with the Martucci case; Gallo campaigns for Herrmann to represent 51 at the National Firefighter's Association's Winter Conference; a familiar face makes a shocking return.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Detective Pryma's case comes to an explosive end with Kidd and Carver's lives in danger; Brett installs an infant safe surrender box at 51; Violet is determined to take Emma down.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.sub-title: A Guy I Used to Know
programme.desc: Firehouse 51 prepares for their semi-annual firehouse inspection; Brett fights to save her paramedicine program; Commander Martin Pearce asks Severide for a favor.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Truck and squad clash after a tense call rescuing a doomsday prepper; Herrmann struggles with Cindy's diagnosis; Violet gives Brett and Gallo dating advice.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Firehouse 51 helps Herrmann put on a school fundraiser; Carver's troubled brother comes to town; a grateful citizen is determined to thank Brett and Severide for saving his life.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: An annoying floater takes a romantic interest in Violet; Ritter catches a local politician in a compromising position; Mouch and Severide help Trudy with an arson investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Police discover a murdered teenage girl was involved in a love triangle.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.sub-title: The Windshield Cracked From Side to Side
programme.desc: Todd Kendhammer claims his wife was killed in a car accident; the forensic evidence doesn't back him up; when a new defense team, known for working on the Steve Avery case is hired, they bring in their own forensic experts who contradict the case.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A man returns to his hometown after years away; he receives a warm welcome from the residents until the noise from a new neighbor's puppies turns him into a vengeful menace who goes to war with the entire community.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.desc: A suitcase filled with unidentified human remains unlocks a missing person's case that has gone unsolved for years; the forensic analysis of a nearly-destroyed cellphone found in the suitcase reveals a mysterious selfie.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A routine protection job goes awry when an explosion in a hotel kitchen masks the kidnapping of the wife of the man the team is guarding.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A man returns to his hometown after years away; he receives a warm welcome from the residents until the noise from a new neighbor's puppies turns him into a vengeful menace who goes to war with the entire community.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.desc: A suitcase filled with unidentified human remains unlocks a missing person's case that has gone unsolved for years; the forensic analysis of a nearly-destroyed cellphone found in the suitcase reveals a mysterious selfie.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A routine protection job goes awry when an explosion in a hotel kitchen masks the kidnapping of the wife of the man the team is guarding.

programme.desc: A man returns to his hometown after years away; he receives a warm welcome from the residents until the noise from a new neighbor's puppies turns him into a vengeful menace who goes to war with the entire community.

programme.desc: A routine protection job goes awry when an explosion in a hotel kitchen masks the kidnapping of the wife of the man the team is guarding.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.desc: A suitcase filled with unidentified human remains unlocks a missing person's case that has gone unsolved for years; the forensic analysis of a nearly-destroyed cellphone found in the suitcase reveals a mysterious selfie.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Kidd, Seager and Carver investigate a fire at the city stables; Kylie clashes with some of the firefighters over changes due to budget cuts; Herrmann struggles to keep it together as Cindy's condition worsens.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Cruz feels the burden of his increased responsibilities; Kidd, Gallo and Carver get caught in the middle of a gang war on a call; Herrmann wrangles Trudy for help lifting Cindy's mood.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Mouch builds a classic fire truck model for the Deputy District Chief but needs assistance from Gallo and Ritter; Brett and Violet encounter multiple victims with a strange set of symptoms; Cindy's chemotherapy results loom over the Herrmann family.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: A familiar face returns to Firehouse 51 to serve with Kidd on a special task force; with Tony close to breaking the CFD's perfect attendance record, Mouch and Capp work to keep him safe; old grudges resurface when Gallo reunites with a family member.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.sub-title: Take a Shot at the King
programme.desc: Boden, Ritter, Herrmann and Kidd work together to take down a local politician responsible for a chemical fire; after his aunt's accident, Gallo worries about their future; Brett steps in to perform Dylan's magic show when he's out of town.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Herrmann works on becoming a better man after Cindy's cancer journey; Kidd bonds with a homeless victim on a call; Kylie takes her firefighter exams; a harrowing call takes a toll on Brett.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Gathering
programme.desc: Adam confronts Jessica for ghosting him and discovers she made assumptions about Kyran's identity; Adam's world is thrown into disarray when Jessica is rushed to hospital during his dad's birthday party, and Kelly seems to know the reason why.

programme.title: Godfather of Harlem
programme.desc: When the property for Bumpy's new club is being sold to a powerful, white real-estate developer, Bumpy must convince the black "Straw Man" to sell it to him instead; Mayme and Elise stage a protest at Margaret's school.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Godfather of Harlem
programme.desc: Bumpy battles a union strike threatening club construction; Elise bails out a fellow Panther; Frank faces consequences for Cowboy Nick's murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
